allow: Bash(node --version && which nvm 2>/dev/null || echo "no nvm" && ls ~/.nvm/alias/default 2>/dev/null || echo "no nvm alias")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); v=d['formulae'][0]['versions']; print\('stable:', v['stable']\)")
Bash(grep -n "homebrew\\|opt/homebrew\\|brew shellenv" ~/.zshrc ~/.zprofile 2>/dev/null || echo "no brew shellenv found")
